basic_details.job_title: JNV Banaskantha – Teacher, Expert and More – 7 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya Banaskantha (JNV Banaskantha) Recruitment 2026 for 7 posts of Teacher/Expert. Candidates with PG Diploma, M.P.Ed., B.P.Ed. OR M.P.Ed The Walk-in on 04-06-2026. For detailed information please visit JNV Banaskantha official website.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate with PG Diploma in Yoga/M.P.Ed., B.P.Ed. OR M.P.Ed., Female Graduate with 3 years experience in self-defense, Certificate/Diploma in Indian Classical/folk Dance, Certificate/Diploma in relevant field (musical instruments), SSC (Class XII) with computer skills.
